src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/backend.general_idea: Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/backend.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 21 (and earlier in newer Jakarta EE versions), causing a compile error if the old import is retained.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern frameworks.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.persistence does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (e.g., Spring Boot 3, Vaadin 24+).
